title: Cloud Breach
learning_objectives: Exploit storage misconfiguration and data exfiltration
key_topics: IAM policy exploitation and privilege escalation
scenario: Scenario TechStartup Africa on AWS. Leaked developer credentials from GitHub. Assess their cloud security posture and demonstrate impact. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA12, RA13 ________________________________________________________________________________

scenario_context.setting: Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of Congo, African digital commerce platform
scenario_context.challenge: Identify and exploit AWS misconfigurations for African digital commerce platform in Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of Congo
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Credential Analysis
subtasks.description: What access do leaked credentials provide?
subtasks.evidence: IAM analysis: identity, policies, permissions, risk
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: IAM analysis: identity, policies, permissions, risk

subtasks.title: Cloud Enumeration
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Storage Exploitation
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Privilege Escalation
subtasks.description: Escalate IAM via role chaining or policy exploitation.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Execute the exploitation with careful attention to OPSEC and evasion. Maintain detailed logs of all actions for evidence and reporting.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Lateral Movement
subtasks.description: Move to other services: Lambda, EC2, databases.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Establish persistence mechanisms that survive system reboots and will maintain access throughout the engagement.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Cloud Security Assessment
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Perform privilege escalation and lateral movement to achieve the mission objectives. Document each pivot point.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

mentor_notes: For OA-M09 - Cloud Breach: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build cloud & container attacks expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
